headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .167 / .300 / .375.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 2, CWS 6. Luinder Avila led the night, working 2.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 2 walks. Maikel Garcia supplied the loudest Royals contact at 106.8 mph.

player_of_game.name: Luinder Avila
player_of_game.reason: worked 2.0 innings with 0 earned runs, 2 strikeouts and 2 walks.
